summary: The test suite covers all core requirements well (version parsing, bump determination, file updates, changelog generation, workflow execution). Good organization with unit and integration tests. However, rigor is limited by missing edge cases (pre-release versions, corrupted JSON, empty commits, file I/O errors) and shallow changelog entry testing. Design is solid with proper isolation and cleanup, but some scenarios lack negative testing. Would catch basic regressions but miss error paths and boundary conditions.
